ddls:
CREATE TABLE "squirrel_sightings" (
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sighting */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the sighting location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the sighting location */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sighting */,
  "shift" TEXT /* Shift of the sighting (AM/PM) */,
  "hectare" TEXT /* Hectare where the sighting occurred */,
  "unique_squirrel_id" TEXT /* Unique ID of the squirrel */,
  "hectare_squirrel_number" INTEGER /* Squirrel number within the hectare */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day (e.g., morning, afternoon, evening) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the sighting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the sighting */,
  "sighting_status" TEXT /* Status of the sighting (e.g., confirmed, pending review) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sighting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_squirrel_sightings_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_squirrel_sightings_unique_squirrel_id FOREIGN KEY ("unique_squirrel_id") REFERENCES squirrels ("squirrel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "squirrels" (
  "squirrel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each squirrel */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age of the squirrel (e.g., Adult, Juvenile) */,
  "primary_fur_color" TEXT /* Primary fur color of the squirrel */,
  "highlight_fur_color" TEXT /* Highlight fur color of the squirrel */,
  "combination_of_primary_and_highlight_color" TEXT /* Combination of primary and highlight fur colors */,
  "color_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the squirrel's color */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the squirrel */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the squirrel */,
  "last_observed_date" TEXT /* Last date the squirrel was observed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the squirrel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("squirrel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "hectare" TEXT /* Hectare where the location is situated */,
  "specific_location" TEXT /* Specific location (e.g., tree stump, ground plane) */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., park, forest, urban) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vocalizations" (
  "vocalization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vocalization */,
  "kuks" INTEGER /* Kuks vocalization (0/1) */,
  "quaas" INTEGER /* Quaas vocalization (0/1) */,
  "moans" INTEGER /* Moans vocalization (0/1) */,
  "vocalization_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the vocalization */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the vocalization (in seconds) */,
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sighting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vocalization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vocalizations_sighting_id FOREIGN KEY ("sighting_id") REFERENCES squirrel_sightings ("sighting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tail_flags" (
  "tail_flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tail flag */,
  "tail_flags" INTEGER /* Tail flags (0/1) */,
  "tail_twitches" INTEGER /* Tail twitches (0/1) */,
  "tail_flag_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the tail flag */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the tail flag (in seconds) */,
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sighting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tail_flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tail_flags_sighting_id FOREIGN KEY ("sighting_id") REFERENCES squirrel_sightings ("sighting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "approaches" (
  "approach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approach */,
  "approaches" INTEGER /* Approaches (0/1) */,
  "indifferent" INTEGER /* Indifferent behavior (0/1) */,
  "runs_from" INTEGER /* Runs from behavior (0/1) */,
  "approach_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the approach */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the approach (in seconds) */,
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sighting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approaches_sighting_id FOREIGN KEY ("sighting_id") REFERENCES squirrel_sightings ("sighting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, data analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was assigned the role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was revoked (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sighting_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sighting */,
  "note" TEXT /* Additional note for the sighting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sighting_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sighting_notes_sighting_id FOREIGN KEY ("sighting_id") REFERENCES squirrel_sightings ("sighting_id")
)
